# postgres

Configuration of a PostgreSQL resource.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `database` | string | no |  | Initial database name. Defaults to the resource name when unset. |
| `depends_on` | array of string | no |  | Names of resources this PostgreSQL instance explicitly depends on. |
| `healthcheck` | [Healthcheck](common-types.md#healthcheck) | no |  | Override of the default `pg_isready` healthcheck. |
| `image` | string | no |  | Explicit image reference. Takes precedence over `version` when both are set. |
| `password` | string | no |  | Superuser password. Generated by the runtime when unset. |
| `port` | integer | no |  | Container port. Defaults to `5432` when unset. |
| `user` | string | no |  | Superuser name. Defaults to `"postgres"` when unset. |
| `version` | string | no |  | Major version. Expanded into `postgres:<version>-alpine` by the runtime when `image` is unset. |
| `volume` | [Volume](common-types.md#volume) | no |  | Persistent volume configuration. Defaults to an auto-named volume when unset. |
